mapper.select: SELECT id , image_key , image_path , use_yn , created_at FROM site_image ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id , image_key , image_path , use_yn , created_at FROM site_image WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id , image_key , image_path , use_yn , created_at FROM site_image WHERE image_key = #{imageKey} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_image ( id, image_key, image_path, use_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_site_image.NEXTVAL, #{imageKey}, #{imagePath}, #{useYn}, SYSDATE )
